title: The Diplomat: '구성이든 영변이든, 북한은 결코 핵무기를 포기하지 않을 것' — 비핵화 불가능성 분석
snippet: Analysis arguing that regardless of which enrichment facility locations are known (Kusong, Yongbyon, or others), North Korea has structurally committed to nuclear weapons as regime survival guarantee and will never negotiate them away. Published in context of Kusong revelation controversy and NPT RevCon.
tag_reason: 이전 7일 소스에 동일 URL·유사 제목 없음. 구성·영변 논란과 NPT RevCon을 연결하는 독립적 분석 기사
